finding_results.notes: Inserted three Marisol-centered interior beats into the first recorder block so the testimony keeps filtering through her bodily sensation, work logic, and personal association before the narration resumes its longer reflective turn.
finding_results.summary: The opening testimony sequence now stays anchored in close third rather than reading as an uninterrupted transcript.

summary: Revised chapter 6 to fix the recorder-sequence focalization drift by restoring Marisol's interior presence throughout the opening testimony block while preserving continuity, voice, and the chapter 7 handoff.
